it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.ServerVirtualView

Description
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Controller
 
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game

  • Uses of ServerVirtualView in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Controller

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Controller with parameters of type ServerVirtualView
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Controller.linkObserver(ServerVirtualView virtualView)
    Registers a ServerVirtualView as an observer of the game model, so the client associated with that view receives all game-event notifications (phase changes, market updates, board updates, etc.).
    Method parameters in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Controller with type arguments of type ServerVirtualView
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Controller.crossRegisterPlayerObservers(List<ServerVirtualView> views)
    Cross-registers every provided ServerVirtualView as a PlayerObserver on every player.

  • Uses of ServerVirtualView in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game with parameters of type ServerVirtualView
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Game.linkObserver(ServerVirtualView vv)
    Registers a ServerVirtualView as an observer of the game, board, and market, so it receives all state-change notifications.

  • Uses of ServerVirtualView in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Player

    Constructors in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Player with parameters of type ServerVirtualView
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Player(String nickname, COLOR color, ServerVirtualView virtualView)
    Builds a player and subscribes the provided virtual view as observer.
